en.extract:
The strange weaver (Ploceus alienus) is a species of bird in the family Ploceidae.
It is found in the Albertine Rift montane forests.

The '''strange weaver''' ('''''Ploceus alienus''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Ploceidae]].
It is found in the [[Albertine Rift montane forests]].
